name: Seazen Holdings Co., Ltd
summary: Seazen Holdings Co., Ltd engages in real estate development business in China. The company is involved in the development of urban complex projects and residential properties. It also provides business and commercial management services. The company was formerly known as Future Land Holdings Co., Ltd. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Shanghai, the People's Republic of China. Seazen Holdings Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Fuyu Development Co., Ltd.
